interpretation.tracking_teacher_dependency: Before treating any local Fig.5/Fig.6 proxy rollout as stronger evidence, repair the robot-order FK tracking teacher. The latest endpoint-group ablation points to the wrist endpoints as the dominant `ee_body_pos` termination contributor, so the next live probe should target wrist endpoint target/body order, FK height, reset velocity/action consistency, and termination semantics.
interpretation.why_not_paper_level: The table aggregates local proxy tasks from local PPO/VAE/denoiser/guidance runs. The exact paper Fig.5/Fig.6 protocol, official checkpoints, TensorRT traces, and real-robot deployment remain absent.

rows.evidence: fig5_fig6_task_protocol_proxy aggregate plus scaled-PPO task-conditioned multiseed aggregate
rows.main_metric: velocity tracking error, reward delta, tracking-error delta, done/fall proxy
rows.next_gap: replace weak tracking teacher, use paper-style task thresholds, and rerun closed-loop guidance
